title: Reserved MIC length values (2-7) not documented in MicLength enum
description: In rust/lichen-link/src/frame.rs, MicLength enum has 2 variants (Bits32=0, Bits64=1), but wire format uses 3 bits allowing values 0-7. Values 2-7 are reserved per spec. The from_u8 method returns None for 2-7, caught as ReservedMicLength error in parsing. A contributor adding MIC-96 support (value 2 per spec evolution) will need to trace parsing to understand why it fails. Add doc comment to MicLength listing reserved values.
close_reason: Added doc comment to MicLength enum explaining reserved values 2-7
